title: The Honolulu J6CR & J2CR, According to 16 Reviewers
description: A synthesis of 16 YouTube reviews of the Honolulu CR series (J6CR elongated, J2CR hybrid, J3CR standard). What the reviewers agree on, where they genuinely disagree, and how much to trust each voice — anchored on lab-tested Johnkew Pickleball numbers and weighted toward the five non-sponsored channels.
